qa_matrix.question_text: Annual Health Checkup - Was there any abnormal finding in Reports/Blood tests?

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a) Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
b) Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
c) Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consecutive weeks at a time

critical_issues: Date of Birth mismatch: The customer's stated DOB (17 July 92) does not match the MER (10-July-1992).
Missing question: The doctor did not ask about congenital defects, disorders, or hereditary diseases.
recommendations: The doctor should ensure all personal particulars, especially Date of Birth, are accurately captured and verified against the MER document.
The doctor should ensure all mandatory questions from the MER, including those about congenital/hereditary diseases, are explicitly asked during the call.
The doctor handled the language preference and initial call drops appropriately by arranging for a suitable doctor and reconnecting.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer was cooperative despite initial language and connectivity issues.
Customer provided clear 'No' responses to most health questions.

validation_errors: Date of Birth mismatch: Transcript (17 July 92) vs MER (10-July-1992).
